name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-pds

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-pds
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Pds SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Pds SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-pds
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common pds
```
